jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Toppr - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
